text: ¢ CloudFront and SNI @ nosstemanio. @ s ¢ Historically ... ‘ p e ...every SSL enabled site needed its own IP e Encryption starts at the TCP connection ... ¢ Host headers happens after that - Layer 7 // Application *SNI is a TLS extension, allowing a host to be included ¢ Resulting in many SSL Certs/Hosts using a shared IP ¢ Old browsers don’t support SNI ...
